_comment: Sample data for FOIATemplateEditor. Each agency entry contains all template variables. Empty strings suppress conditional {{#if}} blocks. Sourced from i-Resist agency data.

agencies.description_scope: This request encompasses headquarters-level records maintained by the Office of the Secretary and central management offices of the Department of Homeland Security.

submission.guidelines: DHS requires electronic submission only. Email submissions are no longer accepted as of January 2026. Submit via the DHS FOIA portal or through FOIA.gov.

agencies.description_scope: This request encompasses records maintained by U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE), a component of the Department of Homeland Security.

submission.guidelines: ICE accepts FOIA requests through its online portal. Specify the ICE office or program area if known. You may also submit via FOIA.gov.

agencies.description_scope: This request encompasses records maintained by U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP), a component of the Department of Homeland Security.

submission.guidelines: As of January 2026, CBP requires submission through its SecureRelease portal or FOIA.gov. Mail, fax, and email submissions are no longer accepted. Include relevant dates, ports of entry, or program names if applicable.

agencies.description_scope: This request encompasses records maintained by the Transportation Security Administration (TSA), a component of the Department of Homeland Security.

submission.guidelines: TSA accepts FOIA requests through the DHS FOIA portal or by mail. Include specific screening incidents, dates, or program names if applicable. You may also submit via FOIA.gov.

agencies.description_scope: This request encompasses records maintained by U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS), a component of the Department of Homeland Security.

submission.guidelines: USCIS accepts FOIA requests through its FIRST online portal. For immigration records, include A-numbers or receipt numbers if available. You may also submit via FOIA.gov.

agencies.description_scope: This request encompasses records maintained by the U.S. Secret Service, a component of the Department of Homeland Security.

submission.guidelines: The Secret Service accepts FOIA requests by mail or through FOIA.gov. Include specific dates, events, or case numbers if known.

agencies.description_scope: This request encompasses records maintained by the Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA), a component of the Department of Homeland Security.

submission.guidelines: FEMA accepts FOIA requests through the DHS FOIA portal or by mail. Specify the disaster number, program, or region if applicable. You may also submit via FOIA.gov.

agencies.description_scope: This request encompasses records maintained by the U.S. Coast Guard, a component of the Department of Homeland Security.

agency.agency_address_line2: 2703 Martin Luther King Jr. Avenue SE

submission.guidelines: The Coast Guard accepts FOIA requests by mail, through the DHS FOIA portal, or via FOIA.gov. Include vessel names, dates, or district information if applicable.

agencies.description_scope: This request encompasses records maintained by all offices of the Department of Justice.

submission.guidelines: DOJ encourages use of its online FOIA portal for submission and tracking. You may also submit via FOIA.gov.

agencies.description_scope: This request encompasses records maintained by all offices of the Federal Bureau of Investigation.

submission.guidelines: FBI accepts requests through its eFOIA portal. Include as much detail as possible about the records sought. You may also submit via FOIA.gov.

agencies.description_scope: This request encompasses records maintained by all offices of the Department of State.

agency.agency_address_line1: Office of Information Programs and Services

submission.guidelines: The State Department accepts requests through its FOIA portal. Processing times vary; complex requests may take longer. You may also submit via FOIA.gov.

agencies.description_scope: This request encompasses records maintained by all offices of the Environmental Protection Agency.

submission.guidelines: EPA accepts FOIA requests through FOIAonline or FOIA.gov. Specify the EPA office, region, or program if known.

agencies.description_scope: This request encompasses headquarters-level records maintained by the Office of the Secretary and central management offices of the Department of Health and Human Services.

agency.agency_name: Department of Health and Human Services (HHS)

submission.guidelines: HHS accepts requests through its FOIA portal. For specific agencies within HHS (e.g., CDC, FDA, NIH), direct your request to the appropriate sub-agency. You may also submit via FOIA.gov.

agencies.description_scope: This request encompasses records maintained by the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), a component of the Department of Health and Human Services.

agency.agency_name: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC)

submission.guidelines: CDC accepts FOIA requests by mail or through FOIA.gov. Include specific program names, dates, or study references if applicable.

agencies.description_scope: This request encompasses records maintained by the Food and Drug Administration (FDA), a component of the Department of Health and Human Services.

submission.guidelines: FDA accepts FOIA requests by mail or through FOIA.gov. Include product names, application numbers, or docket numbers if applicable.

agencies.description_scope: This request encompasses records maintained by the National Institutes of Health (NIH), a component of the Department of Health and Human Services.

submission.guidelines: NIH accepts FOIA requests by mail or through FOIA.gov. Specify the NIH institute or center, grant numbers, or study titles if applicable.

agencies.description_scope: This request encompasses records maintained by all offices of the Department of Education.

submission.guidelines: The Department of Education accepts FOIA requests by mail or through FOIA.gov. Include specific program names or offices when possible.

agencies.description_scope: This request encompasses records maintained by all offices of the Office of Management and Budget.

submission.guidelines: OMB requires requests to specify date ranges and describe records with reasonable detail. You may also submit via FOIA.gov.

agencies.description_scope: This request encompasses records maintained by all offices of the U.S. DOGE Service.

submission.guidelines: The U.S. DOGE Service is subject to FOIA per federal court rulings. Submit requests through the Executive Office of the President FOIA portal or via FOIA.gov.

request_defaults.description: All FOIA case tracking logs, FOIA processing records, or any equivalent records maintained in the agency's case management system for the previous quarter (October 1, 2025, through December 31, 2025), including but not limited to: the date each request was received, the tracking number or unique request identifier, a summary or description of the records requested, the date of the agency's response, the disposition of each request (e.g., full grant, partial grant, full denial, referral, withdrawal), any FOIA exemptions cited in partial or full denials, and the number of pages or records released, withheld, or referred. {{description_scope}}
request_defaults.preferred_format: native electronic format (e.g., CSV, Excel, or PDF)
request_defaults.fee_waiver_justification: This request is made in the public interest to promote government transparency and accountability.
